reason: The statement does not apply in this text fragment as there is no indication of Yahweh expressing frustration that the Hebrews are not listening to him or his messenger. In fact, the focus of this passage is on Rahab, a Canaanite woman, acknowledging the power of the LORD and seeking mercy and protection from the Israelites. There is no mention of frustration on the part of Yahweh towards the Hebrews in this context.
